decisions.reasoning: WWDC 2026 keynote is live today (June 8). Apple announced Gemini-powered Siri, iOS 27, macOS 27 with deep AI integration. Morgan Stanley calls WWDC a key catalyst for AI-winner rerating, with upside to $365-$440. Stock is near all-time highs. Signal is long. No cash headroom to add (92.8% gross exposure vs 95% cap). Hold through WWDC catalyst.

sources.headline: Apples WWDC Is June 8. Heres the 1 Announcement That Could Move the Stock

sources.outlet: Yahoo Finance / Morgan Stanley via StockTwits
sources.headline: Apples WWDC 2026 Key Catalyst For AAPL Stock, Will Decide AI Positioning: Morgan Stanley

decisions.invalidation: WWDC disappoints on AI (Siri rollout delayed, Gemini integration poorly received) or Apple loses Gemini deal; stock breaks below $295 on post-WWDC selloff

decisions.reasoning: FTC has escalated antitrust probe (civil investigative demands to 6 competitors, examining Azure bundling and Copilot licensing). Trump executive order on AI software review adds regulatory headwind. However, Build 2026 announced strong AI agent expansion (Office Copilot Agent Mode, GitHub autonomous coding agent, Azure AI Foundry), fiscal Q3 beat expectations, and 34/36 analysts rate Buy with Morgan Stanley at $650 target. Locking in a -3.12% loss here without fundamental deterioration is premature. Signal remains long.

sources.headline: Microsoft Stock MSFT Surges Into Build 2026 as Morgan Stanley Eyes 52% Azure Upside
The FTC Is Escalating Its Antitrust Probe into Microsofts Cloud and AI Grip
Microsoft Corp Stock MSFT Moved Down by 3.61% on Jun 2: A Full Analysis

decisions.invalidation: FTC issues formal complaint or DOJ joins investigation; Azure growth decelerates below 25% in next earnings; stock breaks below $390

decisions.reasoning: June 5 drop of 6.2% was macro-driven: strong May payrolls beat raised Fed rate-hike fears and Broadcom missed its AI chip revenue guidance, hitting the whole sector. NOT a fundamental Nvidia issue. Company reported record $82B revenue (+85% YoY) in most recent quarter, driven by Blackwell ramp — the fastest product ramp in company history. Today Jensen Huang announced LG Group partnership for humanoid robots and advanced data center architecture. 62 analyst consensus is Strong Buy with $298.42 average target (45% upside from current). Bear risks: CUDA moat erosion in inference workloads, Rubin architecture delay, custom silicon competition from hyperscalers. Signal is flat (10/30 SMA nearly equal) which is cautionary but not a sell signal. Holding with close monitoring.

sources.headline: Nvidia Shares Sink After Strong US Jobs Data Sparks Tech Selloff
Here we go again with Nvidia falling on earnings. What the sellers are missing
Massive News for Nvidia Stock Investors
Nvidia Stock NVDA Forecast: Bear Case vs Bull Case Scenario for 2026

decisions.invalidation: Flat SMA signal crosses to short; next earnings miss on revenue or guidance cut; hyperscaler capex guidance pulled back; Fed hikes rates before year-end

decisions.reasoning: Only profitable position (+1.23%). Signal is long (fast SMA 752 > slow SMA 738). Broad market is in uptrend. Macro risks present: Goldman risk appetite indicator at 99th percentile (historically associated with below-average 12-month forward returns), consumer sentiment plunged to record low (war in Iran, cost of living). But near-term technical momentum is intact and SPY provides diversified beta vs individual stock risk.

sources.headline: Stock Market Live June 2 2026: SP 500 SPY Slips After Testing Record Highs

decisions.invalidation: SPY breaks below 200-day MA; Goldman risk appetite mean-reverts sharply; Fed surprises with rate hike

summary: First session — held all 4 existing positions (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, SPY); no trades; WWDC live for AAPL, macro selloff context for NVDA, FTC headwind for MSFT; day P/L +$72.49 (+0.75%); gross exposure 92.8% leaves no cash headroom to add
open_theses: AAPL: WWDC Gemini-Siri announcement could drive AI-winner rerating; watch post-WWDC price action for add opportunity if stock reacts well
NVDA: Macro-driven June 5 selloff not fundamental; Blackwell ramp record revenue intact; flat SMA signal needs resolution upward before adding more
MSFT: FTC investigation is primary overhang; watching for escalation vs settlement; Azure AI agent monetization (Build 2026) is long-term catalyst
SPY: Watching Goldman risk appetite normalization; if macro volatility increases consider trimming to free up cash for single-name adds
